verdict.answer_first: Tie: A opens with "Use a managed provider, not your own"; B opens with "use a managed auth provider, don't roll your own."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more specifically with "start with Clerk or Supabase Auth depending on whether you value speed-to-ship... or low cost and data ownership"; B mainly says "Pick based on your stack and customer type" with a broader table.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it narrows the next move to "Clerk or Supabase Auth" with a simple decision rule; B adds useful but slower branching around WorkOS/Auth0/Cognito and export checks.
